headline: Shreveport Daddy 😡🔫 BLASTS 8 Kiddos 💥👶 RIP
text:
Shreveport Louisiana 🐊🇺🇸 turned into a NIGHTMARE 😱🌙 at 5AM ⏰💥 when psycho daddy Shamar Elkins 🔫👨‍👧‍👦 went FULL RAGE MODE 😤🍆 on his own kiddos! Ages 1-14 👶🧒💀 – EIGHT 😩🙏 LIL ANGELS 🚫❤️ popped like WATER BALLOONS 💦🎈 in a 'DOMESTIC DISTURBANCE' 😂🪓 that ain't no tea party ☕👻! Gunman daddy sprayed 10 peeps 🩸🔥 then jacked a whip 🚗💨 and PEACED OUT 🏃‍♂️🚔 – cops CHASED 🐶📡 his ass to Bossier Parish 🏘️ and DROPPED HIM DEAD 💀🪦 like a bad TikTok trend 📱❌!

Mayor Tom Arceneaux 😢👨‍💼 weeping: 'Hurting families 💔👨‍👩‍👧‍👦, hurting cops 👮‍♂️😭, WHOLE CITY MOURNING 🪦😩!' Some victims his own BLOOD 🩸👪 – talk about FAMILY REUNION FROM HELL 🔥👹! Police Chief Wayne Smith 🤯❤️: 'Can't EVEN imagine this HORROR SHOW 🎥💀!' Cops found the BABIES 🍼💀 at multiple cribs 🏠🏠 on West 79th & Harrison – ALL DECEASED JUVIES 😢🚫, one fled to neighbor's like 'SAVE ME BRO' 🆘🏃‍♀️!

Councilman Grayson Boucher 📈😤 spilling FACTS: 'Domestic drama = 30% murders 🩸📊 – now DOUBLED 💥😂 cuz ONE DADDY SNAPPED!' Homicides MOONED 🚀🩸 in Shreveport like NVDA stocks but DEADLY 😈! Gov Jeff Landry 🏛️🙏 'HEARTBROKEN 💔😭 praying for y'all!' Wife too 👩‍❤️‍👨 – and House Speaker Mike Johnson 🇺🇸📜 holding Shreveport in 'THOUGHTS & PRAYS' 🙏😢 like every mass shoot script 🎬🔫!

DEADLIEST since Joliet IL Jan '24 📅💀 – GVA says 8+ victims 🩸 (4+ shot = MASS SHOOT 🥇😱, suspect NOT COUNTED 🙅‍♂️)! Lone wolf Elkins 🐺🔫 CARJACKED 🚗💨, cops lit him UP 🔥🚔 – justice served HOT 😎🍟 but 8 BABIES GONE FOREVER 👻💨! Community CRUSHED 😭🏘️, first responders HEROES 🦸‍♂️🙌 – pray up Louisiana, this DOMESTIC BOMB 💣🏠 rocked the bayou harder than Hurricane Katrina remix 🌪️😢! Shreveport simps for peace now ✌️😩 – NO MORE DADDY DRAMA ‼️🔒
